description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a stark contrast between dark and light facades, with the front and rear walls painted black and the sides in white. Large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light inside. The house sits on a wooden deck that extends into an outdoor patio area, furnished with seating and a large umbrella. Several trees and shrubs are positioned around the property, adding greenery and shade. The main entryway is accessible from the deck and is accentuated by a small overhang and steps.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, contrasting black and white facades, large windows, and a wooden deck patio with outdoor furniture and surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black facade, main entryway, large windows, patio with umbrella, and a tree close to the deck.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the white wall, minimal windows, and the wooden deck extending along the side with trees spaced apart.
description_view_2: Rear view with a white facade, symmetrical windows, and a partial view of the patio and trees behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the black wall, rear door, patio furniture, umbrella, and trees positioned around the deck.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, small overhang, steps, and a wooden deck patio
